reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (headless Chrome, real 337 MB download + on-device run, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: Real WASM run verified in headless Chrome: clicked Download (~337 MB), loader reached state=ready, then Embed produced a live 1024-d result (6x6 cosine matrix, 36 cells) in 675 ms with zero console errors. Node cross-check (transformers.js 3.7.5) on Xenova/gte-large q8 returned DIM 1024. Screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/gte-large-embeddings/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/gte-large-embeddings/mobile.png; conformance loads-clean + calls-real-inference = pass.
rubric.notes: Real feature-extraction pipeline in a Web Worker; no fake output.

rubric.evidence: Expected output shape + semantic sanity confirmed: 1024-dimensional mask-aware mean-pooled + L2-normalized vectors (readout showed dims=1024). Semantic search for 'I can't sign in' ranked 'The login page keeps rejecting my credentials.' #1 (cosine 0.85 in the Node cross-check), correctly above the refund/Eiffel/garden distractors. Output is a real numeric embedding, semantically consistent. Screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/gte-large-embeddings/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/gte-large-embeddings/mobile.png.

At-a-glance links the exact model id Xenova/gte-large to its card, names task feature-extraction, states q8 quantization and WASM backend; inference runs off the main thread in worker.js (new Worker). conformance declares-model-id/declares-task/declares-backend/declares-quantisation/inference-off-main-thread = pass.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~337 MB)'. After download the shared createModelLoader auto-inits to state=ready exposing only a 'Clear cached model' control. On a cached RELOAD (same profile) the page auto-initialised to ready with NO Download button and no console errors — returning users never click Load. conformance shared-auto-init-loader = pass.
rubric.notes: Auto-init on cached model verified in-browser.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — streamed download progress via the loader's role=status live region; failures surface on the page (loader Retry + per-run .status.err), never only the console; HF weights cached in Cache Storage for offline reuse. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU required) — the no-GPU headless run produced real output, so it just works without WebGPU. conformance live-status-region + errors-on-the-page = pass; honest-progress-retry-offline + runs-without-webgpu-fallback = manual (verified).

Agent verdict — Embed & compare, Reset, semantic-search input + Search, sentence-inspect select, and the 'Compare large vs small' button are all real, labelled and keyboard-operable; the search input responds to Enter. Ladder pages add k-slider, threshold slider, dedup and two-stage rerank controls. Verified operable headless. conformance controls-operable = manual (verified).

Agent verdict — every visible number is produced by the on-device onnxruntime-web run: the matrix cells, PCA scatter and ranked list all derive from the real 1024-d embeddings returned by the worker; no canned result. Verified real output sample (top-1 = credentials line). conformance no-fake-output = manual (verified).

role=status aria-live loader + result status regions; labelled buttons/inputs/select; the similarity matrix uses scope=col/row header cells with title tooltips; no content images (decorative SVG favicon only). conformance images-have-alt + buttons-have-names = pass.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280x800 (light+dark) and mobile 360x740 DPR3 (dark) screenshots reviewed: no horizontal overflow (measured 0px on mobile), at-a-glance table wraps, grid-2 collapses to one column, matrix sits in an overflow-x:auto scroller, legible text, controls >=44px. responsive-check automated: desktop clean, mobile clean. conformance responsive-desktop + responsive-mobile = pass; parity-both-classes = manual (verified).

Agent verdict — all embedding inference runs in a Web Worker (off the main thread); the client-side maths (cosine, PCA-2D, k-means) operates on a handful of already-computed vectors so it never blocks input. Main thread stayed responsive during the 337 MB load and the 675 ms embed. conformance inp-stays-low = manual (verified).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use flex-wrap + min-inline-size:0 to avoid overflow, repeat(auto-fit, minmax()) for responsive grids, logical properties, and an overflow-x:auto container for wide tables.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — grid-2 uses repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px,1fr)); the cosine matrix and comparison tables live in overflow-x:auto scrollers; controls wrap with flex-wrap; sizing uses inline-size/block-size logical properties.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: mobile 360px measured 0px horizontal overflow; responsive-check desktop+mobile clean

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy synchronous work off the interaction path; offload to a Web Worker.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all transformers.js inference runs in worker.js; only lightweight vector maths runs on the main thread, on already-computed embeddings.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js runs the feature-extraction pipeline; main thread responsive during 675 ms embed

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Pause/avoid heavy background work when not needed; no busy polling.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the page does no background loops or polling; the worker is idle between requests and results stream via a promise handshake.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: no timers/polling in gtelarge.js; loader status via a single live region

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control; announce state in an accessible live region; give data tables proper header semantics.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live loader + result regions, labelled inputs/buttons/select, matrix uses scope=col/row th cells.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto is in the shared public/styles.css that every page links.

openQuestions: Would a WebGPU execution-provider path meaningfully cut GTE-large's ~675 ms/embed latency on capable devices, while keeping the honest WASM fallback?

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU fast path for gte-large-embeddings (honest WASM fallback retained) to reduce the large-model latency the page highlights.
Add a Matryoshka/dimension-truncation demo showing GTE-large vectors truncated to 256/512-d to trade a little quality for smaller storage and faster cosine.

summary: Revision-1 agent build+matrix pass for gte-large-embeddings: real 337 MB download + on-device 1024-d feature-extraction verified in headless Chrome (top-1 semantic search correct, 675 ms, console clean), cached reload auto-inits with no Download button, light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0px overflow, legible, operable). Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above. modern-web-guidance consulted (css-layout, break-up-long-tasks, efficient-background-processing, accessibility, cross-document-transitions).
